parameters.query: SELECT a.id, a.kind, a.symbol, a.operator, a.target_value, a.last_triggered_at, COALESCE(a.telegram_chat_id, (SELECT chat_id FROM telegram_subscribers WHERE is_admin = true ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1)) AS dest_chat FROM market_alerts a WHERE a.active = true
INSERT INTO market_alert_events (alert_id, symbol, message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
UPDATE market_alerts SET last_triggered_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
